2604.06161.title: DiffHDR: Re-Exposing LDR Videos with Video Diffusion Models
2604.06161.paper_summary: Most digital videos are stored in 8-bit low dynamic range (LDR) formats, where much of the original high dynamic range (HDR) scene radiance is lost due to saturation and quantization. This loss of highlight and shadow detail precludes mapping accurate luminance to HDR displays and limits meaningful re-exposure in post-production workflows. Although techniques have been proposed to convert LDR images to HDR through dynamic range expansion, they struggle to restore realistic detail in the over- and underexposed regions. To address this, we present DiffHDR, a framework that formulates LDR-to-HDR conversion as a generative radiance inpainting task within the latent space of a video diffusion model. By operating in Log-Gamma color space, DiffHDR leverages spatio-temporal generative priors from a pretrained video diffusion model to synthesize plausible HDR radiance in over- and underexposed regions while recovering the continuous scene radiance of the quantized pixels. Our framework further enables controllable LDR-to-HDR video conversion guided by text prompts or reference images. To address the scarcity of paired HDR video data, we develop a pipeline that synthesizes high-quality HDR video training data from static HDRI maps. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DiffHDR significantly outperforms state-of-the-art approaches in radiance fidelity and temporal stability, producing realistic HDR videos with considerable latitude for re-exposure.
2604.06161.paper_summary_zh: 大多數數位影片以 8 位元低動態範圍 (LDR) 格式儲存，其中由於飽和和量化，許多原始高動態範圍 (HDR) 場景的輻射損失。這種高光和陰影細節的損失使得準確映射亮度到 HDR 顯示器變得不可能，並限制了後製工作流程中的有意義重曝光。儘管已提出將 LDR 圖像轉換為 HDR 的動態範圍擴展技術，但它們在恢復過度曝光和不足曝光區域的現實細節方面面臨挑戰。為了解決這個問題，我們提出了 DiffHDR，一個將 LDR 到 HDR 轉換公式化為視頻擴散模型潛在空間中的生成輻射修補任務的框架。通過在 Log-Gamma 顏色空間中運作，DiffHDR 利用來自預訓練視頻擴散模型的時空生成先驗，在過度曝光和不足曝光區域合成合理的 HDR 輻射，同時恢復量化像素的連續場景輻射。我們的框架進一步實現了可控的 LDR 到 HDR 影片轉換，並以文本提示或參考圖像為指導。為了解決配對 HDR 影片數據的稀缺，我們開發了一個管道，從靜態 HDRI 地圖合成高品質的 HDR 影片訓練數據。廣泛的實驗表明，DiffHDR 在輻射保真度和時間穩定性方面顯著超越了最先進的方法，生成現實的 HDR 影片，並具有相當的重曝光寬容度。
2604.06161.author: Zhengming Yu et.al.
2604.06161.authors: Zhengming Yu, Li Ma, Mingming He, Leo Isikdogan, Yuancheng Xu, Dmitriy Smirnov, Pablo Salamanca, Dao Mi, Pablo Delgado, Ning Yu, Julien Philip, Xin Li, Wenping Wang, Paul Debevec
